---
title: "Week 05"
---

::: {style="color: #6284a2"}
### Monday (03/09)
:::

**Topics**

-   Sufficiency

**Daily assignment**

-   Daily assignment

**Class activity**

-   Sufficiency practice problems

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #6284a2"}
### Wednesday (03/11)
:::

**Topics**

-   Rao-Blackwell

**Daily assignment**

-   None!

**Class activity**

-   TBD

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #6284a2"}
### Friday (03/13)
:::

**Material through today is fair game for Midterm 1!**

**Topics**

-   Newton-Raphson or EM algorithm

**Daily assignment**

-   Daily assignment

**Class activity**

-   TBD

```{=html}
<!--
-   Example [implementation](class/EM_solns.qmd)

    -   Downloadable `.Rmd` template {{< downloadthis class/templates/EM_normal_mixture.Rmd dname="EM_normal_mixture" label=".Rmd" icon="arrow-down-short" class=styled id=btn1 >}} and data {{< downloadthis class/data/normal_mixture_data.Rda dname="normal_mixture_data" label=".Rda" icon="arrow-down-short" class=styled id=btn1 >}}
-->
```
